title: Bhasha Detect — Identify India's 22 Scheduled Languages In Your Browser
tagline: Paste text in any of India's 22 scheduled languages — plus Hinglish — and watch it get identified by Unicode script and character n-grams, with an honest confusion-matrix explorer. 100% client-side, no API key.
description: In-browser language ID for India's 22 scheduled languages + Hinglish: script detection + char n-grams, with a confusion matrix. No API key.
